title: Finance — normalized invoice
description: Read-side normalized invoice shape. Maps from Moneybird sales + purchase invoices per modules/finance/connectors/moneybird.md §5.1 and §5.2. Sales and purchase invoices share this shape, distinguished by `direction`.

external_ref.description: Human-readable invoice reference (sales invoice number, or vendor reference on purchase). Falls back to Moneybird's internal invoice_id when no vendor reference is set.

direction.description: `outgoing` = sales invoice (we billed someone). `incoming` = purchase invoice (someone billed us).

counterparty.description: Customer (outgoing) or vendor (incoming). Joins to the Contact source via `ref`.

due_at.description: Due date. Nullable: some invoices have no formal due date.

status.description: Normalized state. Maps from Moneybird `state` per moneybird.md §5.1.

value.description: Decimal as string to avoid float drift. e.g. "1234.56".
